label: Bald Eagle Nesting Pairs (USA)
deltaNote: From 417 pairs in 1963 at species low

label: Iberian Lynx Total Population
deltaNote: From 94 individuals in 2002 (world's most endangered cat)

label: California Condor Total Population
deltaNote: From 27 captive birds in 1987; 347 now in the wild

label: Giant Panda Wild Population
source: China 4th National Survey 2015; IUCN Red List 2016

label: Gray Wolf Population (Lower 48 USA)
contestNote: State vs federal counts diverge; some states dispute federal delisting criteria
deltaNote: From ~1,000 wolves in the mid-1990s before Yellowstone reintroduction

label: Mountain Gorilla Total Population
source: IUCN SSC Primate Specialist Group / census 2018–2024

label: Wild Tigers in India
source: National Tiger Conservation Authority, India — All India Tiger Estimation 2022
deltaNote: From ~1,400 in 2006; now >75% of world's wild tigers

label: Species Delisted Due to Recovery (US ESA)
contestNote: Critics argue some delistings were due to data revisions or political pressure rather than genuine recovery
